channel.title: Tamazia Insights
channel.description: Lawyer-led SEO and compliance content perspectives from Tamazia.

item.title: SEC Regulation FD and the Pre-IPO Digital Footprint: A Checklist for 2026 Listings
item.description: Pre-IPO content protocol for listings on NYSE, Nasdaq, LSE Main Market, and DFM. The 18-month digital-footprint timeline that produces zero-incident outcomes.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.source: SEC Reg FD · FCA Listing Rules
item.category: SEC Reg FD · FCA Listing Rules
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: How One Asia Pacific Hotel Group Replaced 83% of OTA Dependency in Six Months
item.description: Anonymised case-study walk-through of the campaign behind 840% organic-user growth and a 113% revenue YoY shift. Direct-booking unit economics at scale.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)

item.title: Why Your Law Firm's SRA Transparency Page Is Probably Non-Compliant in 2026
item.description: SRA Code Rules 8.7 and 8.9 require specific fee, complaints and regulatory information on every solicitor's website. Most still miss the same five items. Here is the audit checklist.
item.dc:creator: Aman Pareek
item.author: founder@tamazia.co.uk (Aman Pareek)
